title: Eight-Year-Old Girl Sets World Record For Limbo Skating Under 16 cm Bar In Ahmedabad
summary_full: The record was achieved by Takshvi Vaghani in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India, on 10 March 2024.
summary_public: The record was achieved by Takshvi Vaghani in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India, on 10 March 2024.
